exact_state_definitions.atr15: simple mean of true range over the latest 20 completed 15m bars within the current continuous price segment, including the decision bar
exact_state_definitions.oi_state: mean of shifted 30-day z scores of log open-interest changes over 15m and 1h, clipped to [-6,6], minimum seven continuous days
exact_state_definitions.flow_state: mean of completed 15m kline taker imbalance and latest causal metrics taker ratio transformed as (ratio-1)/(ratio+1), clipped to [-1,1]
exact_state_definitions.premium_z: latest completed 5m premium-index close standardized by a shifted 30-day rolling mean/std in its continuous segment
exact_state_definitions.funding_percentile: latest settled funding rate ranked against the previous 270 settled rates only; minimum 60 prior rates; long directional percentile is p and short directional percentile is 1-p
exact_state_definitions.core_4h_direction: sign shared by BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT completed 4h log returns at the same 15m decision_time; zero when signs disagree, either value is missing, or either return is zero

event_deduplication.breakout: raw rolling-level crossing events are identified before threshold filters; keep first event and suppress later events of the same symbol, side and lookback for eight completed 15m bars
event_deduplication.shock: raw two-bar midpoint-reclaim events are identified before threshold filters; keep first event and suppress later events of the same symbol for sixteen completed 15m bars

adjacency.breakout: same lookback; exactly one ordered threshold index differs by one step; categorical core/clock may differ only to an adjacent predeclared state
adjacency.shock: exactly one ordered threshold index differs by one step; categorical core/clock may differ only to an adjacent predeclared state

portfolio_tie_break: highest threshold-normalized event strength, then BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT

slot_release.stop_or_target: five minutes after the touching 5m bar open, i.e. at that bar close
slot_release.time_exit: five minutes after the max-hold 5m open
